response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience across diverse stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) and demonstrates technical leadership through workshops, talks, and open-source projects. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical analysis — the core domain of this Principal-level Growth/Experimentation role. The seniority gap (Senior/Staff vs. IC6 Principal) and lack of platform-scale experimentation work make this a stretch hire, though the strong fundamentals and recent AI-agent infrastructure work could translate.
strengths: 13+ years across web, mobile, embedded with proficiency in multiple required languages (C/C++, Java, JS/TS, Python-adjacent)
High-throughput, low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of requests/sec
Demonstrated technical leadership: founded open-source platform, ran workshops, mentored via Refactoring Dojos and Selenium courses
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout automation
No evidence of metrics/telemetry infrastructure or statistical/experimental analysis work
Title trajectory (Senior/Staff) and scope suggest below Principal/IC6 bar for cross-org platform ownership

key_factors.factor: Strong polyglot engineering fundamentals at scale
